title: Investigation into a swimming pool’s compliance with consent requirements under the Personal Information Protection and Electronic Documents Act
summary: The Office of the Privacy Commissioner of Canada (“ OPC ”) received a complaint under the Personal Information Protection and Electronic Documents Act (“ PIPEDA ”), from an individual alleging that a privately owned swimming pool in Canada requires parents/guardians to give consent to allow photographs and/or videos of their children be t...
